name: OpenRocket
description: Free, open-source model rocket simulator for designing and simulating rockets of all sizes. Features a graphical design interface, stability analysis, and 6-DOF flight simulation with real motor data.
whyUseIt: OpenRocket is the best way to learn rocket design principles hands-on without building hardware. It teaches centre of pressure, stability margins, drag estimation, and trajectory prediction — all concepts that scale directly to full-size launch vehicles.

vocabulary.definition: One body diameter — stability margin is measured in calibres
Centre of Pressure / Centre of Gravity — their relative position determines stability

beginnerMistakes: Ignoring stability margins — always check CP is behind CG
Using motors that are too powerful for the airframe
Not accounting for wind in flight simulations
